<?php namespace Knuckles\Camel\Extraction; use Knuckles\Camel\BaseDTOCollection; /** * @extends BaseDTOCollection<Response> */ class ResponseCollection extends BaseDTOCollection { public static string $base = Response::class; public function hasSuccessResponse(): bool { return $this->first( fn($response) => strval($response->status)[0] == '2' ) !== null; } }
